title: Task Manager App
description: This project was developed during my summer internship and represents a user-friendly application for task management, both individually and within a group. The app allows users to efficiently organize, track, and collaborate on tasks in a simple and intuitive way.

title: Artificial Intelligence and the Academic Life of Students
description: This is an article written alongisde two of my colleagues - Stefan Luncanu & Catalin Dajiu. The research aimed to identify students' views on the connection between the use of ChatGPT and their academic performance. The researched was done and published in 2024.

title: ML Model for Student Grade Prediction
description: This project is curredtnly being developed as part of my Bachelor's thesis. The project aims to predict a student's average grade and classify it into a risk category. The model will also come with a data visualizer. The project is meant to have a final version in June 2026.

title: Coffee Shop Website
description: This project is curretnly being develop as part of my perosnal project portofolio. It started as an idea to develop my skills in React and its purpose is to represent a website for a local Bucharest coffee shop. It is  build using React, HTML and CSS.
